terms.title: Albedo
terms.summary: Base color map without lighting, shadow, or highlights.

terms.title: High Poly
terms.summary: A mesh that is high in polygonal density (Lots of faces/verts/edges), and contains all the surface detail you want visually. This can be either a "Subdivided" or "Smooth Mesh Preview" of the "Base Mesh" in Maya/Blender/etc from the "SubD" workflow, or a sculpted mesh from ZBrush/Blender, or a high quality output from CAD software (Plasticity/Fusion 360), or even just boolean mesh that has lots of topology to ensure it looks nice/smooth/round where expected.

terms.title: Normal Map
terms.summary: Texture that encodes surface directions to fake small-scale detail.

terms.title: UV Unwrapping
terms.summary: Flattening a 3D model's surface into a 2D layout for texturing.

terms.title: Rigging
terms.summary: Creating bones and controllers so a model can be posed and animated.

terms.title: PBR Workflow
terms.summary: Physically Based Rendering approach using energy-conserving materials.

terms.title: Topology
terms.summary: Arrangement and flow of polygons that affect deformation and shading.

terms.title: IK vs. FK
terms.summary: Two approaches for controlling limbs in character animation.

terms.title: HDRI
terms.summary: High dynamic range images used to light scenes with realistic reflections.

terms.title: Ambient Occlusion
terms.summary: Shading that darkens creases and corners where light is occluded.

terms.title: Keyframe
terms.summary: A defined value at a specific time that drives animation curves.
